message: Fix release workflow for CGO builds

files.patch:
@@ -25,8 +25,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run GoReleaser
         uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
         with:
-          version: latest
+          version: "~> v2"
           args: release --clean
         env:
           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-

@@ -20,7 +20,6 @@ builds:
       - -s -w -X main.version={{.Version}}
     goos:
       - darwin
-      - linux
     goarch:
       - amd64
       - arm64
@@ -51,4 +50,3 @@ changelog:
       - "^docs:"
       - "^test:"
       - "^chore:"
-
